idea.title: Product Launch Email Funnel Builder
idea.description: 35 prompts for e-commerce founders to write a full pre-launch, launch day, and post-launch email sequence that maximizes conversion revenue.
idea.rationale: E-commerce founders have a high-stakes, revenue-tied need for full launch email sequences; AI generates persuasive sequential email copy extremely well, and a complete funnel template in one pack has strong perceived value over scattered free examples.
